tsTroubleshooting.title: 1754 Unexpected action curing lamps while not initialized

abstract.p: 1754 Unexpected action curing lamps while not initialized.

tsSymptoms.p: Resolve the error on the operator panel and on multiple re-occurrences: create a trace file immediately after the occurrence and escalate to HQ.
